summary: iOS 🟥 FLAMINGO | FALCON | Language change does not update FW on Charge Case
scenario: Language change triggers DFU but fails to update the Charge Case firmware, leaving it on an outdated version.
description_clean: When a language change is triggered, the firmware update (DFU) does not update the Charge Case component. After DFU completes, the Charge Case remains on outdated firmware. Expected behavior: Language change should trigger firmware updates on all components, including the Charge Case.
steps: Trigger a language change on the device.
Check if the Charge Case component receives a firmware update.
After DFU completes, verify the firmware version of the Charge Case.
expected: Language change should trigger firmware updates on all components, including the Charge Case. After DFU completes, the Charge Case should be on the latest firmware.
actual: After DFU completes, the Charge Case remains on outdated firmware.
